languages.text: "Я знаю позицию, откуда можно глянуть на Погонщицу и спланировать атаку".
"I know a vantage point where we can get a look at the Drover and plan our attack."
languages.original_text: "Я знаю позицию, откуда можно глянуть на Погонщицу и спланировать атаку".

traits.locale_text: "I know a vantage point where we can get a look at the Drover and plan our attack."
"I know a vantage point where we can get a look at the Drover and plan our attack."
"Well, we only live once. Don't be afraid, I'm not threatening you. I know a vantage point where we can get a look at the Drover and plan our attack."
"I know a vantage point where we can get a look at the Drover and plan our attack."
"I know a vantage point where we can get a look at the Drover and plan our attack."

languages.text: 「まあ、人生は一度きりですから。怖がらないでください。脅しているわけではありません。ドルーバーを見渡せる有利な場所を知っていますから、そこで攻撃の計画を立てましょう。」
languages.original_text: "Well, we only live once. Don't be afraid, I'm not threatening you. I know a vantage point where we can get a look at the Drover and plan our attack."

traits.locale_text: 「まあ、人生は一度きりですから。怖がらないでください。脅しているわけではありません。ドルーバーを見渡せる有利な場所を知っていますから、そこで攻撃の計画を立てましょう。」

languages.text: "Çoban'ı görüp saldırımızı planlayabileceğimiz bir gözetleme noktası biliyorum."
languages.original_text: "I know a vantage point where we can get a look at the Drover and plan our attack."

traits.locale_text: "Çoban'ı görüp saldırımızı planlayabileceğimiz bir gözetleme noktası biliyorum."

languages.text: «Conozco una posición desde la que podemos observar al Pastor y planificar nuestro ataque».
languages.original_text: "I know a vantage point where we can get a look at the Drover and plan our attack."

traits.locale_text: «Conozco una posición desde la que podemos observar al Pastor y planificar nuestro ataque».

languages.text: “我知道一个有利位置，可以观察拒生花，制定进攻计划。”
languages.original_text: "I know a vantage point where we can get a look at the Drover and plan our attack."

traits.locale_text: “我知道一个有利位置，可以观察拒生花，制定进攻计划。”

languages.text: « Je connais une position avantageuse d'où nous pourrons observer le Chasseur pour préparer notre attaque. »
languages.original_text: "I know a vantage point where we can get a look at the Drover and plan our attack."

traits.locale_text: « Je connais une position avantageuse d'où nous pourrons observer le Chasseur pour préparer notre attaque. »

languages.text: "Ich kenne eine Stelle, von der wir gute Sicht auf den Treiber haben und unseren Angriff planen können."
languages.original_text: "I know a vantage point where we can get a look at the Drover and plan our attack."

traits.locale_text: "Ich kenne eine Stelle, von der wir gute Sicht auf den Treiber haben und unseren Angriff planen können."
